infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Card Valuer needs camera access to scan Pokemon TCG cards and identify them.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Card Valuer needs photo library access to save and share card scan exports.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Card Valuer needs permission to save exported files to your photo library.

plugins.cameraPermissionText: Card Valuer needs camera access to scan Pokemon TCG cards.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Card Valuer to access your photos.
